calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Omar Nakib appearing for petitioner Robert Pechoultres. Counsel has filed a declaration by the petitioner regarding the DOD this morning. He requested the Court to waive the requirements of re-publish and re-notice of the correct DOD on 5/16/07. He agreed that the order can be made subject to him sending a copy of the declaration to all parties. Matter submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Continued To Sep-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
